title: Exploring with Files
description: Navigate your filesystem like a true explorer! Learn to find your way around.

steps.instruction: The Files app is already open. In the left sidebar, click on 'Documents' to navigate there.
steps.hint: Look at the sidebar on the left. You'll see a list of places. Click 'Documents'.

steps.instruction: You should see some fun files here! Now click on 'Home' in the sidebar to go to your home folder.
steps.hint: Click 'Home' in the left sidebar to navigate to /home/you.

steps.instruction: From here you can see all your folders — Desktop, Documents, Downloads, and more. Click on 'Desktop' in the sidebar.
You'll see Welcome.txt and todo.txt on the Desktop. Double-click Welcome.txt to open it!
steps.hint: Double-click on the Welcome.txt file to open it in the text editor.
